code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut first = true
    mut i = 0
    mut word = ""
    mut in_word = false
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          if in_word
            if first
              result = "#{result}#{word}"
              first = false
            else
              result = "#{result} #{word}"
            end
            word = ""
            in_word = false
          end
        else
          if not in_word
            in_word = true
            if b >= 97 and b <= 122
              let up = b - 32
              word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(up)}"
            else
              word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
            end
          else
            word = "#{word}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
          end
        end
      when None
        i = n
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if in_word
      if first
        result = "#{result}#{word}"
      else
        result = "#{result} #{word}"
      end
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
